emails.subject: RE: NIMO/Notice RE: Posting of Additional Security
emails.subject_base: NIMO/Notice RE: Posting of Additional Security
emails.body: I received the margin letter this morning via Fax. However, it is backdate= d to Nov 19th for my phone call with Richard Ott at NIMO. We have 5 days t= o deliver (some flexibility to view it as 5 business days). The margin cal= l is for $4,283,512. It is to cover NIMO for settlement and imbalance risk= for EES participation in their "Supplier Select" program.=20 Molly
